jobs.prompt: 16:9 editorial illustration for a university lecture on linear dependence, basis, and matrix rank. Show several vectors from a common origin, with two or three clearly lying in one shared plane and one highlighted as redundant or dependent; nearby suggest a calm matrix or pivot structure without readable symbols. The scene should feel mathematically precise and explanatory, not decorative abstraction. Warm paper background #faf9f5, ink-like accents #141413, dusty blue #6a9bcc, terracotta #d97757, olive #788c5d. Premium academic style, spacious composition, no readable text, no digits, no formulas, no UI.
